user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the timesheet management notification templates list, so that I can manage timesheet notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Sheet Management Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view a specific timesheet notification template such as TimeSheet Management Job Notification, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the timesheet notification templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the timesheet notification templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Sheet Management Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view for timesheets, so that I can manage emails alongside notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Sheet Management Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
